meaning: <法>查特酒(法国查特修道院僧侣酿制的黄绿色甜酒巴),黄绿色
examples: Or I see a chartreuse-yellow tennis ball on the lawn, pick it up and throw it.
The above photo shows a picturesque mix of coral, chartreuse, peach, pale yellow and crimson leaves.
It is a warm and sunny room and the pink is a perfect compliment to the chartreuse chairs and melon sofa.
The frilly leaves of coral bells (Heuchera) come in shades of purple, chartreuse or even orange.
Nicki Minaj glowed on the red carpet in a chartreuse gown with a mermaid hem from Monique Lhuillier.
